close_reason: Duplicate of csz6: Arc<Client> is intentional
description:
secretx-aws-kms/src/lib.rs:49 stores 'client: Arc<aws_sdk_kms::Client>'. aws_sdk_kms::Client is internally Arc'd already, so the outer Arc is redundant for cloning purposes (clone of Client is already a refcount bump).

Why this is fine: the AwsKmsBackend itself is held inside Arc<dyn SigningBackend> by callers via inventory dispatch (factory returns Arc<...>). The double-Arc costs one extra atomic refcount per construction (not per call) and gains uniformity with sister backends. A future contributor who 'simplifies' by removing the outer Arc must also re-derive Clone for AwsKmsBackend (the auto-derive may break if other fields gain non-Clone bounds), and the diff churn is not worth the saved word.

Defendable: the outer Arc is consistent with secretx-aws-sm/secretx-aws-ssm structure; uniformity matters for code review.
title: Arc<aws_sdk_kms::Client> is intentional even though Client is itself cheaply cloneable
